summary: Patched the model-bridge section in bot_core.py to respect MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES before any bridge opens and to re-fetch open trades before each individual bridge open.
Added explicit bridge race/cap logs so concurrent-process duplicates can be skipped instead of opened.
result: Bridge block now logs BRIDGE SKIP when already at capacity, BRIDGE CAP HIT if capacity is reached during the intent loop, and BRIDGE RACE SKIP if another process opened the slug first.
Existing native signal loop was left unchanged.
bot_core.py started successfully after the patch with bridge kill switch still off.
risks: Live observation of BRIDGE SKIP / BRIDGE CAP HIT / BRIDGE RACE SKIP was not captured in this run because ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE remains disabled for this task.
